# Coding Conventions — ai-os

> Auto-generated by AI OS. Update to reflect actual team agreements.

## Naming Conventions

- **General style:** kebab-case
- **TypeScript interfaces:** PascalCase (e.g., `UserProfile`)
- **Types/Enums:** PascalCase
- **Variables/functions:** camelCase
- **Constants:** SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE

## File Structure Rules

- All source code lives under `src/`

## Code Style

- Prefer early returns over deep nesting
- Validate all external inputs at API/form boundaries
- Async/await over .then() chains
- No commented-out code in commits
- No secrets or credentials in source code

## Testing

- Framework: **Vitest**
- Unit tests for all business logic
- Integration tests for API endpoints
- Never hit real external services in unit tests — mock them
